validations.min: The %{field} field must be at least %{min} characters
validations.max: The %{field} field must be at most %{max} characters
validations.alpha_dash: The %{field} field may contain alpha-numeric characters as well as dashes and underscores
validations.email: The %{field} field must be a valid email address
validations.numeric: The %{field} field may only contain numeric characters
validations.between: The %{field} field must be between %{min} and %{max}
validations.min_value: The %{field} field must be %{min} or more
validations.url: The %{field} field is not a valid URL
